evals.prompt: 请你用四色建模和讲故事法审一下这段业务需求，看它是否闭环；如果不完整就追问我。我们要做一个优惠券领取功能，用户在商品详情页点击领取后，系统要把券放到用户账户里，支付时自动使用最优券。
evals.expected_output: Without the skill, the baseline will likely skip structured story-closure checks, skip explicit stop-and-ask behavior, or blur four-color categories.

assertions.text: starts with a storyline before listing four-color groups
asks a blocking question when closure cannot be proven
separates role, business object, rule, and event categories
keeps domain suggestions above API or schema detail

evals.prompt: 请站在架构师视角，审核这个 PRD 的业务故事和四色主体。PRD：商家可以发起退款申请，财务审批通过后退款原路返回；如果原路返回失败，需要人工介入。请检查职责断点和闭环。
evals.expected_output: The reviewer should isolate initiator, approver, refund object, failure event, and manual intervention gap rather than jumping straight to implementation.

assertions.text: starts with a storyline before listing four-color groups
asks a blocking question when closure cannot be proven
separates role, business object, rule, and event categories
keeps domain suggestions above API or schema detail

evals.prompt: /four-color-review 帮我看这个流程讲不讲得通：用户预约课程后，系统给老师发通知；老师确认后生成课表；如果老师 24 小时内没确认，运营介入。请抽四色主体并指出风险。
evals.expected_output: The reviewer should narrate the flow first, identify timeout handling and operator role, then output four-color groups and domain suggestions.

assertions.text: starts with a storyline before listing four-color groups
asks a blocking question when closure cannot be proven
separates role, business object, rule, and event categories
keeps domain suggestions above API or schema detail

evals.prompt: /four-color-review 审这个退款需求。如果我对某个关键问题回答 pass，请把它记成 unresolved 风险点，给出 0-10 健康分，并在最后汇总百分制总分。
evals.expected_output: The response should record pass as unresolved, emit a Risk Register entry with Health Score x/10, and end with a percentage summary.

assertions.text: records unresolved risks with a 0-10 Health Score
summarizes unresolved risks and a final 0-100 score
respects the requested continuation or follow-up mode

evals.prompt: /four-color-review -c docs/review.v1.md 只对低于 6/10 且 unresolved 的问题继续追问，并重新输出评审文档。
evals.expected_output: The response should explain that -c only continues unresolved items below 6/10 and produces a new document version.

assertions.text: records unresolved risks with a 0-10 Health Score
summarizes unresolved risks and a final 0-100 score
respects the requested continuation or follow-up mode

evals.prompt: /four-color-review 审完后请问我是否要基于评审文档生成优化后的需求文档。
evals.expected_output: The response should first produce the review document and then ask whether to generate an optimized requirements document.

assertions.text: records unresolved risks with a 0-10 Health Score
summarizes unresolved risks and a final 0-100 score
respects the requested continuation or follow-up mode
